Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.operator

Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.

See: Description

Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.operator Description

Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions. New is also considered an operator (TypeOperator).
